prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为约11780名→15581名→14748名→16203名→23577名，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约8800名；2025年位次23577为历史最高（ 最差），较2024年大幅后移7374名，属异常波动；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为20人，2026年计划仍为20人，连续6年持平，无扩招 或缩招，计划因素对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海军军医大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜排名未进入前200名（属200名开外），但作为军队医科院校在 业内享有较高声誉；声誉文件中该校未出现，近年无重大负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度总排名第9（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高 ，可能吸引更多考生竞争；第五轮学科评估文件中未收录海军军医大学数据，无法获取具体学科评级；该校以临床医学、麻醉学、医学影像学、药学等医科专业 为主，医学类专业整体社会热度偏热。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年热度评级为"推荐"（偏热），护理学为"推荐"（偏热），医学类专业整体报考热度较高；湖南省物 理类考生2025年320192人，2026年增至347000人，增幅约8.4%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；海 军军医大学位于上海市，非本省高校，湖南省考生报考需考虑跨省地域偏好；该校在本省无特殊招生倾斜，全国招生分布均衡。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常后移7374名 后的回调需求、2026年招生计划持平、湖南省物理类考生增长8.4%加剧竞争、抖音高热反映关注度上升等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准23577名基础上小幅回调（竞争 略缓和），预测最低位次约23277名，区间22777–23777名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 11780 → 15581 → 14748 → 16203 → 23577, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8800 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 ranking of 23577 is the highest (worst) historically, a significant backward shift of 7374 positions compared to 2024, indicating an abnormal fluctuation; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 20 students from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 20 students, unchanged for 6 consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, so the plan factor has no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Naval Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, not ranked in the top 200 on the Soft Science main ranking (outside the top 200), but as a military medical university, it enjoys a high reputation in the industry; the university does not appear in the reputation file, with no major negative public opinion or enrollment cutoff records in recent years; Douyin heat ranking is 9th overall (high heat), with large exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high attention from applicants, potentially attracting more competition; the fifth round of discipline evaluation files does not include Naval Medical University data, so specific discipline ratings cannot be obtained; the university mainly offers medical majors such as Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, Medical Imaging, and Pharmacy, with medical majors overall being relatively hot in society.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the heat rating for Clinical Medicine was 'Recommended' (relatively hot), Nursing was 'Recommended' (relatively hot), and medical majors overall have high application heat; the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province was 320,192 in 2025, increasing to 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4%, intensifying competition due to the larger examinee pool; Naval Medical University is located in Shanghai, not a local university in Hunan Province, so Hunan applicants need to consider cross-province regional preferences; the university has no special enrollment tilt in this province, with a balanced national enrollment distribution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction demand after the abnormal backward shift of 7374 positions in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province intensifying competition, and the high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly correct (competition slightly eases) based on the 2025 baseline of 23577, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 23277, and a range of 22777–23777.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 22777–23777, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine, Medical Imaging, Pharmacy) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Traditional Chinese Medicine, Anesthesiology) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Biotechnology, Nursing) as a safety net. When the ranking is better than the lower limit of 22777, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
